phrases.phrase: Ἰωσίας δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν Ἰεχονίαν καὶ τοὺς ἀδελφοὺς αὐτοῦ ἐπὶ τῆς μετοικεσίας Βαβυλῶνος.
phrases.translation: And Josiah begot Jeconiah and his brothers at the time of the deportation to Babylon.
phrases.summary: The text states that Josiah fathered (gave birth to) Jeconiah and Jeconiah’s brothers, specifically occurring during the period of the Babylonian deportation/relocation.
